title: AutoCommand+
description: Client-side Fabric command scheduler for Minecraft 1.21.4 - 1.21.11 with Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib support. Configure single commands, multi-command sequences, randomized timing windows, batch repeats, rate limits, dry-run logging
body:
AutoCommand+ is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you schedule Minecraft commands automatically.

  Configure single commands or multi-command sequences, set custom timing windows, repeat command batches, and manage execution through a clean Mod Menu / YetAnotherConfigLib settings screen.

  Features:
  - Single command scheduling
  - Multi-command sequences
  - Configurable min/max delay windows
  - Batch repeat support
  - Global command rate limit
  - Dry-run mode for testing
  - Command logging
  - Runtime status display
  - Optional multiplayer server allowlist
  - Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib integration

  AutoCommand+ is designed for automation on worlds and servers where scheduled commands are allowed.
